blocks.label: Excavation — Foundation Trenches
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall execute excavation of foundation trenches in accordance with the foundation plan:

Excavation depth: {{excDepth}} m below {{excReference}}
Finished level: {{finishedLevel}}
Estimated excavation volume: {{excVolume}} m³ (indicative — final quantities based on actual site conditions)

Soil type (expected): {{soilType}}
Soil classification: {{soilClass}}
Groundwater level (expected): {{groundwaterLevel}}

The Supplier shall:
- Excavate to the specified depth and tolerances per the foundation plan
- Maintain trench stability (shoring, sheet piling, or sloped excavation as required)
- Keep excavations dry (dewatering included unless explicitly excluded)
- Provide level and compacted trench bottom suitable for foundation placement
- Stockpile suitable excavated soil on site for backfill (if instructed by STM)

The Supplier shall confirm in the quotation:
- Method of excavation
- Equipment to be deployed
- Dewatering method (if applicable)
- Assumed soil conditions and classification
- Any assumptions regarding contamination or obstructions

Any deviation from the above specifications shall be explicitly stated with technical justification. STM reserves the right to reject non-compliant alternatives.

variables.label: Finished level
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall confirm the reference levels used and any assumptions regarding existing ground level.

variables.label: Soil type
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall state the assumed soil type. If actual conditions deviate materially, the Supplier shall notify STM immediately before proceeding.

variables.label: Groundwater level
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall state assumed groundwater conditions and the dewatering method to be applied if groundwater is encountered.

blocks.label: Soil Disposal & Transport
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall dispose of surplus excavated soil (afvoer vrijkomende grond):

Estimated disposal volume: {{disposalVolume}} m³
Soil destination: {{soilDestination}}
Maximum transport distance included: {{maxDistance}} km

PFAS classification: {{pfasClass}}
AP04 / soil report: {{soilReport}}

The Supplier shall:
- Load, transport, and dispose of surplus soil at a licensed receiving facility
- Provide transport tickets (weegbonnen) per load
- Comply with all applicable environmental regulations (Besluit bodemkwaliteit)

If soil conditions deviate from the classification assumed (e.g. contamination discovered during excavation), the Supplier shall halt work and notify STM immediately. Additional costs for contaminated soil disposal shall be agreed prior to execution.

Pricing:
- Per m³ loose measure (los gemeten) or per m³ in-situ — state clearly which basis
- Per load transport (state vehicle type and capacity)
- Tipping fee: included or stated separately

variables.label: AP04 / soil report
options: Available — to be provided on request
Not yet available — Supplier to assume clean soil
variables.default: Available — to be provided on request

blocks.label: Backfill & Compaction
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall backfill and compact after foundation works:

Backfill material: {{backfillMaterial}}
Compaction requirement: {{compactionReq}}
Estimated backfill volume: {{backfillVolume}} m³

The Supplier shall:
- Backfill in layers not exceeding {{layerThickness}} mm
- Compact each layer to the specified density
- Provide compaction test results if requested by STM
- Grade finished surface to specified levels and tolerances

If imported fill material is required, the Supplier shall state the source and confirm compliance with Besluit bodemkwaliteit.

variables.label: Compaction
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall state the compaction method and achievable density.

blocks.label: Site Preparation & Grading
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall execute site preparation and grading works:

Scope:
- Strip topsoil to depth of {{stripDepth}} mm across {{stripArea}} m²
- Stockpile topsoil on site at designated location
- Grade subgrade to specified levels (per site plan)
- Install temporary access roads / hardstanding (if required)

Finished subgrade tolerance: +/- {{gradeTolerance}} mm

The Supplier shall confirm equipment and duration required.

blocks.label: Applicable Standards
blocks.text:
All works shall comply with at minimum:

- NEN-EN 16907 (earthworks)
- CROW Publication 400 (Grondwerk en grondmechanica)
- Besluit bodemkwaliteit (soil quality regulations)
- Regeling bodemkwaliteit
- PFAS handelingskader (current version)
- AP04 testing protocol

Safety:
- VCA** certification required
- CROW 96b (working along roads, if applicable)

The Supplier shall confirm VCA certification status and provide a copy upon request.
The Supplier shall confirm compliance with all applicable PFAS limits for the project location.

Attach: VCA certificate, method statement, waste management plan.

overrides.ch5_priceBreakdownItems:
Excavation:
- Per m³ excavation (state: in-situ or loose measure)
- Per m³ backfill and compaction

Soil disposal:
- Per m³ clean soil disposal (including transport and tipping)
- Per m³ contaminated soil disposal (if applicable — state classification)
- Per load transport (state vehicle type and capacity)

Additional rates:
- Per hour standby / waiting time
- Per day dewatering (if applicable)
- Mobilisation / demobilisation: lump sum
overrides.ch5_surchargeItems:
- Minimum order surcharge
- Weekend or extended hours working
- Additional dewatering beyond assumed conditions
- Rock or obstruction removal
- Emergency contamination handling
overrides.ch6_exclusionItems:
- Foundation concrete works (by others)
- Steel structure and superstructure
- Building permits and environmental permits (by STM)
- Soil investigation / geotechnical survey (by STM)
- Archaeological survey (if required)
- Traffic management plan (if on public road — by STM)
- Utility diversions (gas, water, electricity, telecom)
- VAT
overrides.ch7_requiredDocuments:
1. Price schedule — unit rates per activity
2. Method statement (excavation, disposal, compaction)
3. Equipment list
4. Assumed soil conditions and classification
5. VCA** certificate (valid)
6. Waste management plan / disposal route
7. Estimated duration and proposed start date
8. Insurance certificate (CAR / AVB)
9. General terms and conditions
10. All deviations and assumptions with justification
